professional_summary:
Proactive and solutions-focused hands-on technical leader and Program Manager, with clear understanding of cloud computing services, as
well as software development and deployment architecture, who thrives in a fast paced, dynamic environment. Provides strong technical
direction and strategy development to Agile and DevOps teams across development unit. Responsible for managing large cross-organizational
strategic programs and driving delivery aligned with strategic business goals. Strong track record for delivery on technical programs, projects
and products in a highly technical, dispersed multi-team environment. A creative, demonstrated leader with superior analytical abilities and
excellent technical, problem solving and cross-team coordination skills, with ability to remove ambiguity, manage dependencies,
communicate effectively, and dive deep into technical details is essential. Possess proven ability to communicate across all management
layers, and clearly and concisely communicate at an executive level on key issues, dependencies and executive action required. Holds PMP
and Scrum certification.

experience.description:
© Provided management and program oversight on IT infrastructure and security projects to support G&A and
Business Units developing, implementing, marketing, and supporting strategic goals.
© Directed security implementation of the Network Access Control solution that identifies and ensured the security
posture of 30,000+ networked devices.
Implemented Data Loss Prevention capabilities for 10,000 endpoint devices and 6,000 email accounts.
« Executed IT business continuity and disaster recovery plans for infrastructure environments hosting RTI systems
and data.
Successfully managed datacenter relocation moving infrastructure to an off-site location.

Provided Finance program management Implementing an internal machine-learning application that connects
people, publications, clients, and proposals by utilizing structured RTI data and a Pinterest-like user interface to
easily locate important data successfully improving customer satisfaction.

Established a proposal tool using Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Immersive Technology to enable proposal writers’
access to historical proposals to support the business development and proposal process.

Developed a revenue prediction application leveraging analytics and statistical data modeling to provide real-time
revenue forecasting from backlog, pipeline and award data to generate insights that are easily accessible.

Created and facilitated communication channels through organization for projects and operations building
relationships across the organization through project-based activities.

Supported data, cyber security, and IT regulatory compliance initiatives, managing quality assurance program,
including on-site evaluations, internal audits and customer surveys.
Wrote and implemented new rework procedures to standardize processes and streamline workflow, updating and

creating policy and procedures around IT security and data integrity.
Mentored quality control personnel ensuring adherence to SOP and work instructions.
Partnered with procurement in the sourcing of vendors to provide security infrastructure solutions overseeing

contract development and execution with vendor.

© Managed project oversight of multimillion-dollar implementations of licensing and regulatory COTS solutions for
government agencies to provide licensing regulatory software.

¢ Lead large cross-functional teams; establishing new processes to ensure adherence to all PM and BA
methodologies.

© Supported Sales team with business development, proposals and contracting to new opportunities.

© Provided 1st level of customer escalation

© Managed program financials including P&L and budget.

© Provided leadership to staff of 32, Project Managers, Business Analyst and QA personnel, defining project roles
and responsibilities,and improve communication among functional areas and global teams.

¢ Partnered with HR and Talent Management to define position profiles, job postings and interviewing
methodologies and best practices

¢ Responsible for building delivery teams; recruiting, developing and mentoring project staff.

« Key contributor to develop and implement Project Management Office Developed best practices, techniques, and
tools for project planning, execution, project management, ongoing mileClaire/deliverable tracking,
communication, and key performance metrics.

© Project managed and implemented web-based application solutions for MicroPact's product offerings — Versa,
CAVU and Entellitrak.

© Unified Communication (UC) Program Manager (2007 — 2010)
© Information Systems (IS) Program Management & Business Operations Manager (2006-2007)
¢ Professional Services Manager, S/W Development and Project Management (2001 — 2006)
© Product Manager for a Joint Venture with ARRIS (2000-2001)
